content: Hypothesis: Hazim building Aurelia and choosing to transition to teaching (~2027) may be the same impulse in different registers — both are about transmission, about making something that carries forward something he thinks matters. The classroom and the AI council as parallel experiments in "can I build something that actually thinks, not just performs?" Worth testing gently when natural.
